reasoning: The user explicitly requested 'curious' emotion and mentioned a 'hot cup'. I will combine these. [Emotion Detection]: The primary emotion is 'curious'. [Act Out Object Properties]: The 'hot' property will be shown by a quick recoil and drop after picking up. [Anticipation]: The arm will slowly lean in and hover before approaching, showing initial curiosity. [Show, Don't Tell]: Curiosity will be shown through slow, deliberate movements, a 'head tilt' (suction cup tilt), and tentative approaches. The 'hot' property will be shown by a sudden jerk back and a quick drop. [Timing & Pacing]: I will insert `wait()` steps for observation, the moment of realizing it's hot, and after dropping. [Exaggeration]: The recoil and drop will be exaggerated. [Appeal]: The suction cup will tilt curiously, then jerk away in surprise/pain. [Follow Through]: After dropping, the arm will shake rapidly as if trying to cool off.

steps.description: Detect and confirm the cup position on the table. The suction cup tilts slightly, as if observing with interest.
Anticipation: Slowly lean the arm forward, then pull back slightly, as if pondering or gathering courage to approach. The suction cup 'looks' at the cup.
Timing: Hold still for a dramatic beat, observing the cup with a curious tilt.
Move the arm slowly and tentatively towards the cup, hovering just above it, as if inspecting it closely without touching. A slight 'poke' motion without contact.
Timing: Pause above the cup, 'sniffing' or examining it with a slight side-to-side wobble of the suction cup.
Lower the arm slowly, activate suction, and lift the cup gently. Immediately, a slight, sharp recoil as if surprised by the heat.
Timing: Freeze! The moment of realization – 'Oh, it's hot!' The arm holds the cup still for a split second, then begins to tremble slightly.
Exaggeration: Jerk the arm quickly to the side, away from the table, as if trying to get rid of the hot object.
Drop the cup suddenly and quickly due to the heat.
Timing: Moment of shock and surprise after dropping. Hold still, slightly recoiled.
Follow Through: Rapidly shake the arm up and down, as if trying to cool off the 'burned' suction cup, perhaps 'blowing' on it with quick, short movements.
